playbook.intent: Five fragmented handoffs → one living artifact carries a feature through PM / Architect / Dev / QA / DevOps with DoR/DoD gates.
playbook.scope: A feature moves through 5 roles with a single living artifact (spec + design + test-plan + runbook). Each role inherits prior context and emits a delta. Handoffs are blocked if Definition-of-Ready is not met; sign-offs are required at Definition-of-Done. QA acceptance and on-call handoff are explicit ceremonies, not implicit assumptions.

success-criteria.criterion: Single living artifact with deltas per role
DoD signed off at each ceremony
On-call handoff completed with runbook walk

stage.name: PM → Architect
stage.intent: PM brief becomes spec; Architect inherits + extends with design.

tasks.task: PM authors spec deltas + acceptance criteria

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after Definition of Ready is signed off. Missing AC = block.

stage.name: Architect → Dev
stage.intent: Design becomes implementation-plan + worktrees + TDD split.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when implementation matches design + first tests are red.

stage.name: Dev → QA
stage.intent: Implementation delta + tests handed off to QA for acceptance signoff.

tasks.task: Author test-plan delta from spec AC

stage.decision-gate: Required: QA signoff. Implicit "looks fine" is not a signoff.

stage.name: QA → DevOps
stage.intent: Tested artifact handed off to DevOps with runbook + observability checklist.

tasks.task: Author runbook for the new path

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when runbook is committed AND a fresh on-call has read it.

stage.name: DevOps → on-call handoff
stage.intent: Production release + on-call rotation absorbs the new path.
stage.decision-gate: Required: on-call ack. Silent handoff = paging surprise.

extra.value: [RFC drafting — see rfc-to-production-feature-delivery (broader playbook), Release-train coordination across multiple teams — separate playbook, Customer-facing comms — see incident-postmortem-preventive-backlog]
[Single feature directory under .aidocs/in-progress/<feature>/, 'Roles named for the feature: PM, Architect, Dev lead, QA lead, DevOps', Test-tdd-red-green-split-agents available]

['Skipping DoR — handoff happens with incomplete context, work re-bounces', Implicit QA signoff — bugs ship as 'I assumed this was tested', Runbook handed to DevOps after deploy — first incident has no playbook, On-call handoff in chat without ack — paging is the lesson]
['Is there ONE artifact, or multiple drifting copies?', 'Did every handoff carry a written DoD signoff?', 'Did the on-call rotation actually read the runbook?']

{human: faion get-content cross-role-handoff-pm-architect-dev-qa-devops --format md, agent: faion get-content cross-role-handoff-pm-architect-dev-qa-devops --format context, json: faion get-content cross-role-handoff-pm-architect-dev-qa-devops --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
